jcr:content.jcr:description: Welcome to the Lab of the Future where we’re tackling the biggest challenges of today and discovering the breakthroughs of tomorrow.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Lab of the future

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: Inside the Lab of the Future

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Working to address today’s most pressing challenges and exploring the innovations of tomorrow—this is the Lab of the Future.

video.name: Video
video.overlayHeading: Welcome to the Lab of the Future

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Michelle Crouthamel, head of digital science at AbbVie, discusses how biosensors and wearable technology are creating new opportunities to meet patient needs.

video.name: Video
video.overlayDescription: Learn how AbbVie collaborates with a community of patients to discover and develop new medicines.

video.name: Video
video.overlayDescription: Scientists Andrew Radosevich and David Chang-Yen go behind the scenes with AbbVie’s Specialized Research in Chaotic Systems team.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: From quick insights to in-depth stories, explore how our scientists and the use of new modalities and technologies are helping shape the future of medicine.

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: Join the team working to transform patient care
